TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Prokopis Pavlopoulos = Mntucing hngkawas 1950 idas 7 jiyax 10 ka Prokopis Pavlopoulos ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Greece ta sayang o kiya ka Prokopis Pavlopoulos, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 3 jiyax 13 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Po-ro-qe-pi-s.pa-fu-ro-rou-po-ro-s Si-ra cng-cu-ciya, mngangal qmpah Sosoto Si-ra, ri-s, mptusa tuparu sapahpaysan ka Po-ro-qe-pi-s.pa-fu-ro-rou-po-ros(kari Si-ra: ll‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶,diyax 10 idas 7 kngkawas 1950). Mhiyu qmpah ney-cng pu-can Si-ra kndadax kngkawas 2004 dhuq kngkawas 2009 (ida ngalan ney-cng,qou-ko-sing-cng mi ci-cung-sing-pu-can ka kngkawas 2004-2007, Nngalan ney-cng mi qou-ko-cu-si-pu-can ka kngkawas 2007-2009). Diyax 18 idas 2 kngkawas 2005, mniq yi-hwey Si-ra nnangal hiyi 233 pnhyuwan sosoto burah ka po-fu-rou-pu-ro-s, diyax 13 idas3 kngkawas 2015 rmirih ka-ro-ro-s. pa-pu-ri-ya-s umarang pnsdhu phiyu qmpah. Ndaan na kndusan Pntingan na nniq Ka-ra-ma-ta ka Row-ke-pi-s.pa-fu-ro-pu-s"2", kiya wa mptusa tuparu sapah paysan ka tama na wa-si-ri-s.pa-fu-row-pu-ro-s."3"bukuy na mniq alang sapah mnhdu prading ppyasan slhayan daw, kngkawas 1968 wada musa muuyas tuparu sapah paysan huway-se-iyeyn Ya-deyn. "3"kngkawas 1975, wada muda mangal hbangan ppyasan cng-fu ka hiya, mnangal tudha tuparu sapah paysan truma qqurun pptasan patas( DEA, Diplome d'etudes approfondies , ya bay mntna psnama ppyasan po-s), kngkawas 1977 mangal slhayan Po-s ke-kou-huwa ri. Kngkawas 1983 wada mangal mptusa mdayaw, kngkawas 1986 wada mkala hu-cyaw-so, kngkawas 1989, wada mangal umaaw mptusa(ceyn-cu) sin-cung-hwa(2), kngkawas 1986 qmpah tudha tparu sapah pyasan mi dmayaw qmpah mptusa.(4) Kngkawas 1990 dhuq kngkawas 1995, qmpah soto Kang-su-tan-ting.Ka-ra-man-ri-su na su-ning hwa-ri-pan-kong-su ka hiya Pa-fu-ro-pu-ro-s, knda daxidas 9 kngkawas 1995 qmpah cu-si sin-min-cu-tang mi-ar-ti-a-ti-s.Ay-fo-to(kari Sira: őúőĻőĽŌĄőĻő¨őīő∑Ōā őąő≤őĶŌĀŌĄ) na cng-cu-ku-wun(2)(5). Kngkawas 1996 ckau maaw ihwe wada mangal i-yeyn-sin-ming-cu-tang, kiya wada sin-ming-cu-tang na sin-wun mi sediq mprngaw cu-syun, kngkawas 2000, kngkawas 2004, kngkawas 2007, kngkawas mi kngkawas 2012 pllutuc mangal i-yeyn A-syang-cyi Ya-teyng. (2)(5)(3) Nniq idas 3 kngkawas 2004 na umaaw i-huwey, wada mangal umaaw ka sin-min-cu-tang, wada ngalan burah cung-fu ko-s-ta-s.Ka-ra-man-ri-s cong-ri phyuwan ney-cung-pu-cang ka Po-fu-ro-pu-ro-s(5)(6).Idas 9 kngkawas 2007 bukuy na wada embiyax mangal umaaw i-hwey dungan, mpriyux cung-fu, wada pspuun ney-cung-pu mi kong-kong-c-si-pu, knttu qmpah pu-cang ka po-fu-ro-pu-ro-s.
S.PHON: = p…ĺokopis pa*lopoulos = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka p…ĺokopis pa*lopoulos ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan g…ĺ…ô…ô ¶…ô ta sajaŇč o kija ka p…ĺokopis pa*lopoulos, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. po-…ĺo-q…ô-pi-s.pa-*u-…ĺo-…ĺou-po-…ĺo-s si-…ĺa ¶Ňč- ¶u- ¶ija, mŇčaŇčal qmpańß sosoto si-…ĺa, …ĺi-s, mptusa tupa…ĺu sapańßpajsan ka po-…ĺo-q…ô-pi-s.pa-*u-…ĺo-…ĺou-po-…ĺos(ka…ĺi si-…ĺa: ll*****,dijax ** idas * kŇčkawas ****). mńßiju qmpańß n…ô- ¶Ňč pu- ¶an si-…ĺa kndadax kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** (ida Ňčalan n…ô- ¶Ňč,qou-ko-siŇč- ¶Ňč mi ¶i- ¶uŇč-siŇč-pu- ¶an ka kŇčkawas ****-****, nŇčalan n…ô- ¶Ňč mi qou-ko- ¶u-si-pu- ¶an ka kŇčkawas ****-****). dijax ** idas * kŇčkawas ****, mniq ji-ńßw…ô si-…ĺa nnaŇčal ńßiji *** pnńßjuwan sosoto bu…ĺańß ka po-*u-…ĺou-pu-…ĺo-s, dijax ** idas* kŇčkawas **** …ĺmi…ĺińß ka-…ĺo-…ĺo-s. pa-pu-…ĺi-ja-s uma…ĺaŇč pnsdńßu pńßiju qmpańß. ndaan na kndusan pntiŇčan na nniq ka-…ĺa-ma-ta ka …ĺow-k…ô-pi-s.pa-*u-…ĺo-pu-s"*", kija wa mptusa tupa…ĺu sapańß pajsan ka tama na wa-si-…ĺi-s.pa-*u-…ĺow-pu-…ĺo-s."*"bukuj na mniq alaŇč sapańß mnńßdu p…ĺadiŇč ppjasan slńßajan daw, kŇčkawas **** wada musa muujas tupa…ĺu sapańß pajsan ńßuwaj-s…ô-ij…ôn ja-d…ôn. "*"kŇčkawas ****, wada muda maŇčal ńßbaŇčan ppjasan ¶Ňč-*u ka ńßija, mnaŇčal tudńßa tupa…ĺu sapańß pajsan t…ĺuma qqu…ĺun pptasan patas( d…ôa, diplom…ô d'…ôtud…ôs app…ĺo*ondi…ôs , ja baj mntna psnama ppjasan po-s), kŇčkawas **** maŇčal slńßajan po-s k…ô-kou-ńßuwa …ĺi. kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal mptusa mdajaw, kŇčkawas **** wada mkala ńßu- ¶jaw-so, kŇčkawas ****, wada maŇčal umaaw mptusa( ¶…ôn- ¶u) sin- ¶uŇč-ńßwa(*), kŇčkawas **** qmpańß tudńßa tpa…ĺu sapańß pjasan mi dmajaw qmpańß mptusa.(*) kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, qmpańß soto kaŇč-su-tan-tiŇč.ka-…ĺa-man-…ĺi-su na su-niŇč ńßwa-…ĺi-pan-koŇč-su ka ńßija pa-*u-…ĺo-pu-…ĺo-s, knda daxidas * kŇčkawas **** qmpańß ¶u-si sin-min- ¶u-taŇč mi-a…ĺ-ti-a-ti-s.aj-*o-to(ka…ĺi si…ĺa: ********* *****) na ¶Ňč- ¶u-ku-wun(*)(*). kŇčkawas **** ¶kau maaw ińßw…ô wada maŇčal i-j…ôn-sin-miŇč- ¶u-taŇč, kija wada sin-miŇč- ¶u-taŇč na sin-wun mi s…ôdiq mp…ĺŇčaw ¶u-sjun, kŇčkawas ****, kŇčkawas ****, kŇčkawas ****, kŇčkawas mi kŇčkawas **** pllutu ¶ maŇčal i-j…ôn a-sjaŇč- ¶ji ja-t…ôŇč. (*)(*)(*) nniq idas * kŇčkawas **** na umaaw i-ńßuw…ô, wada maŇčal umaaw ka sin-min- ¶u-taŇč, wada Ňčalan bu…ĺańß ¶uŇč-*u ko-s-ta-s.ka-…ĺa-man-…ĺi-s ¶oŇč-…ĺi pńßjuwan n…ô- ¶uŇč-pu- ¶aŇč ka po-*u-…ĺo-pu-…ĺo-s(*)(*).idas * kŇčkawas **** bukuj na wada …ômbijax maŇčal umaaw i-ńßw…ô duŇčan, mp…ĺijux ¶uŇč-*u, wada pspuun n…ô- ¶uŇč-pu mi koŇč-koŇč- ¶-si-pu, knttu qmpańß pu- ¶aŇč ka po-*u-…ĺo-pu-…ĺo-s.
S.FORM: = Prokopis Pavlopoulos = Mntucing hngkawas 1950 idas 7 jiyax 10 ka Prokopis Pavlopoulos ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Greece ta sayang o kiya ka Prokopis Pavlopoulos, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 3 jiyax 13 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Po-ro-qe-pi-s.pa-fu-ro-rou-po-ro-s Si-ra cng-cu-ciya, mngangal qmpah Sosoto Si-ra, ri-s, mptusa tuparu sapahpaysan ka Po-ro-qe-pi-s.pa-fu-ro-rou-po-ros(kari Si-ra: ll‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶,diyax 10 idas 7 kngkawas 1950). Mhiyu qmpah ney-cng pu-can Si-ra kndadax kngkawas 2004 dhuq kngkawas 2009 (ida ngalan ney-cng,qou-ko-sing-cng mi ci-cung-sing-pu-can ka kngkawas 2004-2007, Nngalan ney-cng mi qou-ko-cu-si-pu-can ka kngkawas 2007-2009). Diyax 18 idas 2 kngkawas 2005, mniq yi-hwey Si-ra nnangal hiyi 233 pnhyuwan sosoto burah ka po-fu-rou-pu-ro-s, diyax 13 idas3 kngkawas 2015 rmirih ka-ro-ro-s. pa-pu-ri-ya-s umarang pnsdhu phiyu qmpah. Ndaan na kndusan Pntingan na nniq Ka-ra-ma-ta ka Row-ke-pi-s.pa-fu-ro-pu-s"2", kiya wa mptusa tuparu sapah paysan ka tama na wa-si-ri-s.pa-fu-row-pu-ro-s."3"bukuy na mniq alang sapah mnhdu prading ppyasan slhayan daw, kngkawas 1968 wada musa muuyas tuparu sapah paysan huway-se-iyeyn Ya-deyn. "3"kngkawas 1975, wada muda mangal hbangan ppyasan cng-fu ka hiya, mnangal tudha tuparu sapah paysan truma qqurun pptasan patas( DEA, Diplome d'etudes approfondies , ya bay mntna psnama ppyasan po-s), kngkawas 1977 mangal slhayan Po-s ke-kou-huwa ri. Kngkawas 1983 wada mangal mptusa mdayaw, kngkawas 1986 wada mkala hu-cyaw-so, kngkawas 1989, wada mangal umaaw mptusa(ceyn-cu) sin-cung-hwa(2), kngkawas 1986 qmpah tudha tparu sapah pyasan mi dmayaw qmpah mptusa.(4) Kngkawas 1990 dhuq kngkawas 1995, qmpah soto Kang-su-tan-ting.Ka-ra-man-ri-su na su-ning hwa-ri-pan-kong-su ka hiya Pa-fu-ro-pu-ro-s, knda daxidas 9 kngkawas 1995 qmpah cu-si sin-min-cu-tang mi-ar-ti-a-ti-s.Ay-fo-to(kari Sira: őúőĻőĽŌĄőĻő¨őīő∑Ōā őąő≤őĶŌĀŌĄ) na cng-cu-ku-wun(2)(5). Kngkawas 1996 ckau maaw ihwe wada mangal i-yeyn-sin-ming-cu-tang, kiya wada sin-ming-cu-tang na sin-wun mi sediq mprngaw cu-syun, kngkawas 2000, kngkawas 2004, kngkawas 2007, kngkawas mi kngkawas 2012 pllutuc mangal i-yeyn A-syang-cyi Ya-teyng. (2)(5)(3) Nniq idas 3 kngkawas 2004 na umaaw i-huwey, wada mangal umaaw ka sin-min-cu-tang, wada ngalan burah cung-fu ko-s-ta-s.Ka-ra-man-ri-s cong-ri phyuwan ney-cung-pu-cang ka Po-fu-ro-pu-ro-s(5)(6).Idas 9 kngkawas 2007 bukuy na wada embiyax mangal umaaw i-hwey dungan, mpriyux cung-fu, wada pspuun ney-cung-pu mi kong-kong-c-si-pu, knttu qmpah pu-cang ka po-fu-ro-pu-ro-s.

"*"kŇčkawas ****, wada muda maŇčal ńßbaŇčan ppjasan ¶Ňč-*u ka ńßija, mnaŇčal tudńßa tupa…ĺu sapańß pajsan t…ĺuma qqu…ĺun pptasan patas( d…ôa, diplom…ô d'…ôtud…ôs app…ĺo*ondi…ôs , ja baj mntna psnama ppjasan po-s), kŇčkawas **** maŇčal slńßajan po-s k…ô-kou-ńßuwa …ĺi. kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal mptusa mdajaw, kŇčkawas **** wada mkala ńßu- ¶jaw-so, kŇčkawas ****, wada maŇčal umaaw mptusa( ¶…ôn- ¶u) sin- ¶uŇč-ńßwa(*), kŇčkawas **** qmpańß tudńßa tpa…ĺu sapańß pjasan mi dmajaw qmpańß mptusa.(*) kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, qmpańß soto kaŇč-su-tan-tiŇč.ka-…ĺa-man-…ĺi-su na su-niŇč ńßwa-…ĺi-pan-koŇč-su ka ńßija pa-*u-…ĺo-pu-…ĺo-s, knda daxidas * kŇčkawas **** qmpańß ¶u-si sin-min- ¶u-taŇč mi-a…ĺ-ti-a-ti-s.aj-*o-to(ka…ĺi si…ĺa: ********* *****) na ¶Ňč- ¶u-ku-wun(*)(*). kŇčkawas **** ¶kau maaw ińßw…ô wada maŇčal i-j…ôn-sin-miŇč- ¶u-taŇč, kija wada sin-miŇč- ¶u-taŇč na sin-wun mi s…ôdiq mp…ĺŇčaw ¶u-sjun, kŇčkawas ****, kŇčkawas ****, kŇčkawas ****, kŇčkawas mi kŇčkawas **** pllutu ¶ maŇčal i-j…ôn a-sjaŇč- ¶ji ja-t…ôŇč. (*)(*)(*) nniq idas * kŇčkawas **** na umaaw i-ńßuw…ô, wada maŇčal umaaw ka sin-min- ¶u-taŇč, wada Ňčalan bu…ĺańß ¶uŇč-*u ko-s-ta-s.ka-…ĺa-man-…ĺi-s ¶oŇč-…ĺi pńßjuwan n…ô- ¶uŇč-pu- ¶aŇč ka po-*u-…ĺo-pu-…ĺo-s(*)(*).idas * kŇčkawas **** bukuj na wada …ômbijax maŇčal umaaw i-ńßw…ô duŇčan, mp…ĺijux ¶uŇč-*u, wada pspuun n…ô- ¶uŇč-pu mi koŇč-koŇč- ¶-si-pu, knttu qmpańß pu- ¶aŇč ka po-*u-…ĺo-pu-…ĺo-s.
